info.english_meaning: to tie to bind to string to catch with a stick
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: sinoti sinute banDe sinIte ca sinAti ca ' (Slo. 15) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'kaRWaM tasya prasinu raBasAd bAhupASadvayena' (sA0 da0 718 vyAKyAyAM samacaraRatarkavAgISakftAyAmudDftaH SlokAMSaH) prasinu prasinIhi baDAna
'kfRuzva pAjaH prasitiM na pfTvIm' (SAM0 brA0 84) prasitiH pASyA mfgabanDanahetuBUtA pAjastejaH
'prasitotsukAByAM tftIyA ca' (pA0 2344) prasitaH=prasaktaH=yastatra nityamevAvabadDa iti vftti:
'visinvanti baDnantIndriyARIti vizayAH syandantAM kulyA vizitAH purastAt' (f0 5838) vizitA vimuktAH
'ye te SukrAsaH kzAM vapanti vizitAso aSvAH' (f0 664) vizitAsaH=viyuktAH
'prajAM tvazwA vi zyatu nABimasmE' (f0 239) vizyatu vimuYcatu vitaratvityarTaH
'vi zyasva Sipre visfjasva Dene' (ni0 6172) vizyasva pramuYca jihvopajihvike Dene aDodazwre vA
'vi muqIkAya te mano raTIraSvaM na sanditam gIrBirvaruRa sImahi' (f0 1253).. visImahi vizitaM SiTilaM kurmaH
'yeBiH pASEH parivitto vibadDo'Nge'Nga Arpita utsitaSca' (aTarva0 61123) utsita UrDvaM badDaH sAyaRastUtTita iti paWati
'tEstvA sarvEraBizyAmi pASEH' (aTarva0 4169) aBizyAmi baDnAmi aBistu sarvErityanena gatArTaH
